emails.subject: Re: EOL Passwords
emails.body: Re: EOL Passwords Mark and I are both unable to attend at that time. Can we reschedule for either 11:00 or after 3:30 Houston time? I assume also that Andrea will attend. I would very much like her input, as I understand she is the one who raised the enforceability issue. Dave Patrick Hansen 07/31/2000 09:02 AM
